name: Dr. Tang
overview: Tang Jiayu, a cardiac surgeon who has practiced abroad for many years, is invited by Vice President Liu Feng to return to China and lead the Heart Center at Beijing Anhe Jisheng Hospital. Along the way, Tang Jiayu finds personal growth and happiness in her career.

trailers.title: 【DRAMA SERIES】DR. TANG 关于唐医生的一切 TRAILER
